{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Amethyst essence
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Amethyst essence]] streamed off [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
